ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pets" (
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pet */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pet */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed of the pet */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the pet */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the pet in cm */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the pet in kg */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the pet */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the pet (e.g., dog, cat) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the pet (e.g., male, female) */,
  "spayed_neutered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pet has been spayed or neutered */,
  "adoption_status" TEXT /* Current adoption status of the pet (e.g., available, pending, adopted) */,
  "intake_date" TEXT /* Date the pet was taken into the shelter */,
  "intake_reason" TEXT /* Reason the pet was brought into the shelter */,
  "microchip_id" TEXT /* Microchip ID of the pet if available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pets_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the breed */,
  "lifespan" TEXT /* Typical lifespan of the breed */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Typical activity level of the breed */,
  "coat_type" TEXT /* Type of coat (e.g., short, long, curly) */,
  "temperament" TEXT /* Typical temperament of the breed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet being vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccination administered */,
  "date_administered" TEXT /* Date the vaccination was administered */,
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the veterinarian who administered the vaccination */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Date the next vaccination is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet being treated */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment administered */,
  "date_administered" TEXT /* Date the treatment was administered */,
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the veterinarian who administered the treatment */,
  "next_follow_up" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up appointment */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_treatments_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoptions" (
  "adoption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption record */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet being adopted */,
  "adopter_name" TEXT /* Name of the adopter */,
  "adopter_email" TEXT /* Email address of the adopter */,
  "adopter_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the adopter */,
  "adopter_address" TEXT /* Address of the adopter */,
  "adoption_date" TEXT /* Date the adoption was finalized */,
  "adoption_status" TEXT /* Current status of the adoption (e.g., pending, finalized, canceled) */,
  "adoption_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the adoption */,
  "adoption_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the adoption process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adoption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoptions_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the volunteer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the volunteer */,
  "skill_set" TEXT /* Skill set of the volunteer (e.g., animal handling, fundraising) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the volunteer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the volunteer */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the volunteer (e.g., days of the week, time slots) */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the volunteer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteer_hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer hour record */,
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer logging hours */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the hours were logged */,
  "hours_logged" REAL /* Number of hours logged */,
  "hours_type" TEXT /* Type of hours logged (e.g., direct care, administrative, fundraising) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the activity performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volunteer_hours_volunteer_id FOREIGN KEY ("volunteer_id") REFERENCES volunteers ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enclosures" (
  "enclosure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enclosure */,
  "enclosure_name" TEXT /* Name of the enclosure */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the enclosure */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the enclosure */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment inside the enclosure (e.g., temperature, lighting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enclosure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pet_enclosures" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enclosure assignment */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet being assigned */,
  "enclosure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enclosure being assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the pet was moved out of the enclosure */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for changing the pet's enclosure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pet_enclosures_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pet_enclosures_enclosure_id FOREIGN KEY ("enclosure_id") REFERENCES enclosures ("enclosure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feeding_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feeding schedule */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet being fed */,
  "feeding_time" TEXT /* Time of the feeding */,
  "feeding_date" TEXT /* Date the feeding was scheduled */,
  "food_type" TEXT /* Type of food being fed */,
  "food_amount" REAL /* Amount of food given */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the feeding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feeding_schedules_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socialization_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socialization activity */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet being socialized */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of socialization activity (e.g., walk, playtime) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was conducted */,
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer who conducted the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the activity */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socialization_activities_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socialization_activities_volunteer_id FOREIGN KEY ("volunteer_id") REFERENCES volunteers ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavioral_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavioral note */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet being noted */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was written */,
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer who wrote the note */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who wrote the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavioral_notes_volunteer_id FOREIGN KEY ("volunteer_id") REFERENCES volunteers ("volunteer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavioral_notes_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id")
)
